title: ICSI Extends Deadline for 20 CPE Credits Requirement for FY 2025-26
content:
# ICSI Extends Deadline for 20 CPE Credits Requirement for FY 2025-26

Ek important update hai. The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) ne apne members ke liye Financial Year 2025-26 ke 20 CPE Credits complete karne ki last date extend kar di hai.

*   **Financial Year:** The extension is for the mandatory 20 CPE Credits requirement for the Financial Year 2025-26.
*   **New Due Date:** Members ab 30th June, 2026 tak apne mandatory 20 CPE Credits complete kar sakte hain.
*   **Announcement:** This update has been announced by the ICSI on its official "What's New" section, indicating a recent notification.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icsi.edu/whats_new_icsi/)

*Published on: 19 June 2026*
